body_txt: Just about every fantasy world has at least one race whose defining characteristic is that they're not just short, but small . Typically around the size of a human child with an age in single digits. They typically fill the role of "comic relief" in an adventuring group (when they're not the protagonists). If any race of the Little People is to be considered tall compared to the rest of those races, it's most likely gonna be a Dwarf . Because they resemble a child, there's a good chance the Little People are magic users . Do not confuse this trope with Lilliputians , who are way smaller, more comparable to insects or rodents than anything human. The following fantasy creatures are almost always examples of Little People: Not to be confused with the animated series of the same name . Also not to be confused with Real Life little people — for tropes relating to humans with dwarfism, see Dwarfism in Media , Little People Are Surreal and Depraved Dwarf .
